close_reason: Implemented syncconfig package with TOML-based staleness rules configuration. Added .turnkey/sync.toml example config.
description:
Define staleness rules for dependency cells:

- Go: go.mod + go.sum → go-deps.toml
- Rust: Cargo.toml + Cargo.lock → rust-deps.toml  
- Python: pyproject.toml / requirements.txt → python-deps.toml

Rules should be declarative and easy to extend for new languages.
Consider a config format like:

[deps.go]
sources = ["go.mod", "go.sum"]
target = "go-deps.toml"
generator = "godeps-gen"
title: Dependency staleness rules configuration
